# RaveFAM

> RaveFAM is where your rave tribe lives — build private crews, track festivals and local shows together, and keep shared memories with your crew. Free to start, no credit card required.

## Product

- [Home](https://myravefam.com/): Overview of RaveFAM — private crews, festival & show tracking, QR + 6-digit claim codes, Dream Boards, and shared memories.
- [App](https://myravefam.com/app): The RaveFAM web app — log in or sign up to build and manage your crew.

## Lineup Explorer

- [Lineup Explorer](https://myravefam.com/lineup-explorer/): Free interactive festival lineup explorer hub — filter by genre or day, search artists, and preview sounds on Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, or Beatport.
- Individual festival lineup pages, one per event, e.g. [HARD Summer 2026](https://myravefam.com/lineup-explorer/hard-summer-2026), [EDC Orlando 2026](https://myravefam.com/lineup-explorer/edc-orlando-2026), [Lost Lands 2026](https://myravefam.com/lineup-explorer/lost-lands-2026), [Dreamstate SoCal 2026](https://myravefam.com/lineup-explorer/dreamstate-socal-2026), [Nocturnal Wonderland 2026](https://myravefam.com/lineup-explorer/nocturnal-wonderland-2026) — see [sitemap.xml](https://myravefam.com/sitemap.xml) for the complete, current list.

## Company

- [Contact](https://myravefam.com/contact): Get in touch with the RaveFAM team, plus answers to common questions about crews, accounts, and using the app.
- [Privacy Policy](https://myravefam.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://myravefam.com/terms)
